title: Don't pick initial random values for verilator-created variables

features.name: mixed blocking and non-blocking assignment to same signal
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned via both blocking assignment in combinational logic and non-blocking assignment in sequential logic

features.name: verilator internal VdlyMask variable initialization
features.description: Code should include a signal with Verilator-created delay mask variables that are randomized with --x-initial unique, where the mask low bit should remain zero
